ocr_findings.description: The diagram illustrating the kabushiki kaisha structure ('株式会社の基本的な仕組み') with four numbered steps and figures is replaced by an image placeholder. Caption text '● 株式会社の基本的な仕組み' is present in OCR but diagram content is lost.
The vertical sidebar chapter label ('第1章 企業活動') on the right margin is not captured in OCR.

reviewer_notes: Lesson 01-01 page on kabushiki kaisha structure. The introductory paragraph, section headings, and the historical narrative about 17th-century Dutch East India Company are all faithfully reproduced. The structural diagram is an image and its internal step labels are unavoidably lost. All textual learning content is intact.
